data.content: Shipment review approved. Dirty workspace failure mode correctly implemented in skills/shipment_review.md:74-81 with rollback to ready_for_implementation, add-note, and handoff capsule. Regression test in src/skills.rs:117-124 covers all key assertions. Both commits (f41cdb623625, b71779a2edee) live on main. Sanity passes at 95.13% coverage.
